scripts.generate: pnpm run generate:ergogen && pnpm run generate:inverse-svgs
scripts.watch:preview: bash -c 'NAMES=${1:-keys}; WATCH=""; for N in ${NAMES//,/ }; do WATCH="$WATCH -w output/outlines/$N-inverse.svg"; done; watchexec --no-vcs-ignore --quiet --wrap-process session --clear $WATCH --shell=bash "for N in ${NAMES//,/ }; do chafa output/outlines/\$N-inverse.svg; done"' --
